title: Volpone
writer: Ben Jonson, Jules Romains, Stefan Zweig
actors: Harry Baur, Louis Jouvet, Charles Dullin
plot: Volpone, an elderly Venetian, connives with his money-crazed servant to convince his greedy friends that he is dying, knowing that each will try to curry favor with him in order to be named his heir. He is inundated with valuable ...
